debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
φ : Formula ℕ
hφ : φ ∈ L
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ)
h₁ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
h₂ : Γ.conj ➝ Γ.conj ⋏ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
this : Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
⊢ Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT

proof: exfalso; exact not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁ (mem_omega_of_mem (T.L_subset (Logic.iff_provable.mp (af (Logic.iff_provable.mpr hφ)))))
successful_attempts: exfalso; exact not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁ (mem_omega_of_mem (T.L_subset (Logic.iff_provable.mp (af (Logic.iff_provable.mpr hφ)))))
